chapter_title.en: The Fifty-Second Assembly, which is Tuesday, the Twenty-Third of the Month of Rabi` al-Awwal, 368 AH.

text: 8 - وبهذا الاسناد، قال: قال رسول الله (صلى الله عليه وآله): قال الله جل جلاله: يا بن آدم، اذكرني بعد الغداة ساعة وبعد العصر ساعة أكفك ما أهمك (3).

en.bilal-muhammad: By this isnad, he said: The Messenger of Allah (s) said: Allah said: O son of Adam! Remember Me for a moment after morning and for a moment after `Asr, and I will suffice you from what worries you.
